ClientSecret values below are placeholders — set the real values via `dotnet user-secrets` locally or via environment variables (MailSettings__ClientSecret / AzureAd__ClientSecret) in each environment. AzureAd.// note: Reuses the same Entra ID app registration as MailSettings. Requires a Web platform redirect URI (https://<host>/signin-oidc) and delegated User.Read/openid/profile/email permissions granted in Entra ID.
